name: Chapmon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Spits bubbles from its mouth to confuse an attacker.

description: A Lesser Digimon that only lives in clear, beautiful waters. For this reason, it is only seen in a limited number of areas within the Digital World . It spends most of the day on the water's surface, and when it sleeps, it sleeps with only its face poking out of the water. It has the sensitivity to detect the approach of opponents just from tiny movements of the water's surface, and will escape to a safe spot before it is found. Even when it is found, it spits its " Foam Shower " from its mouth to confuse the opponent with the bubbles, then flees.
